_description: IPL news feed. The Home page renders items with `featured: true` in a magazine-style hero layout — those should ALWAYS be ongoing-season stories with strong CTA headlines. The /news page renders every item, featured or not.
_instructions: Required fields: id, headline, url, source, date (YYYY-MM-DD), category.

Optional: excerpt, ctaHeadline (short, click-compelling, used on the Home hero), kicker (BREAKING / FEATURE / EXCLUSIVE etc.), heroColor (hex — drives the hero gradient), featured (boolean — only set true for in-season headline stories).

items.ctaHeadline: Kohli Just Rewrote His Biggest Rivalry With One Shot
items.headline: Virat Kohli breaks Rohit Sharma's most-runs-against-a-single-team IPL record
items.excerpt: With a 28 off 18 cameo against CSK at Chepauk, Kohli pushed his career total against the Super Kings to 1,174 runs in 36 matches — overtaking Rohit Sharma's 1,161 vs KKR and setting a new IPL rivalry benchmark.

items.ctaHeadline: The 14-Year-Old Tearing Through IPL 2026 — Meet Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
items.headline: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: 252 runs in 7 matches at a strike rate of 200+ — the teenager blowing IPL 2026 wide open
items.excerpt: From a 15-ball half-century against CSK to another fireworks display against GT, the Bihar teenager is the story of the season so far. Rajasthan's boldest auction punt is paying off in style.

items.ctaHeadline: Rajasthan Stun The Champions In Guwahati
items.headline: Rajasthan Royals pull off last-over thriller against defending champions RCB
items.excerpt: Riyan Parag's men chase down 200 with two balls to spare as RCB's title defence hits a speed bump on their away trip. The Royals climb to 4th on the table.

items.ctaHeadline: LSG Move Fast On Hasaranga's Replacement
items.headline: Lucknow Super Giants sign George Linde as replacement for injured Wanindu Hasaranga
items.excerpt: Justin Langer's side moves quickly to plug the spin gap left by Hasaranga's injury, signing the South African all-rounder on a direct replacement deal ahead of their next fixture.

items.ctaHeadline: Rohit's Fastest IPL Fifty — 23 Balls Of Pure Fire
items.headline: Rohit Sharma strikes 23-ball fifty — his fastest ever in the IPL — in MI's statement chase vs KKR
items.excerpt: The Mumbai Indians opener brought up his 50th IPL half-century in the powerplay on the way to a 38-ball 78. A 'leaner, fitter, more savage' Rohit is on a mission in 2026.

items.ctaHeadline: Shami's LSG Debut: 2 For 9 And A Statement
items.headline: Mohammed Shami's miserly 2/9 sets up LSG's win over former team SRH; Pant's 68* seals it
items.excerpt: Shami's first outing in LSG colours after the off-season trade was a clinical one — four overs, two wickets, nine runs. Rishabh Pant's rare half-century steered the chase home.

items.ctaHeadline: Inside KKR vs LSG — Eden Under The Lights
items.headline: IPL 2026 Match 15 highlights: KKR vs LSG at Eden Gardens
items.excerpt: Andre Russell's big-hitting cameo and a late-innings collapse — watch the full highlights from the Eden Gardens thriller.

items.headline: Code of Conduct breaches reported in DC vs GT Match 14
items.excerpt: Match referee reports two Level-1 breaches; fines issued, no suspensions.

items.headline: CSK vs PBKS at Chepauk — blockbuster recap
items.excerpt: Ricky Ponting's Punjab Kings steal a result in Chennai in a game featuring four sixes off the final over. CSK's bowling questions continue.

items.headline: IPL 2026 begins: 10 teams, 74 matches, 13 venues
items.excerpt: The 19th edition of the Indian Premier League gets underway with defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru kicking off the tournament on 28 March. The final is scheduled for 31 May.

items.headline: IPL 2026 mini-auction: Cameron Green becomes most expensive overseas player at ₹25.20 crore
items.excerpt: Kolkata Knight Riders splash out a record fee for the Australian all-rounder. Prashant Veer and Kartik Sharma become the most expensive uncapped players at ₹14.20 crore each, both going to CSK. Matheesha Pathirana joins KKR for ₹18 crore.

items.headline: Ravindra Jadeja moves to Rajasthan Royals after 12 seasons at CSK
items.excerpt: The former CSK captain who played 12 seasons for the franchise will represent Rajasthan Royals in IPL 2026 following a successful trade deal — one of the most significant transfers in IPL history.

items.headline: Sanju Samson moves from Rajasthan Royals to Chennai Super Kings
items.excerpt: The RR captain-wicketkeeper will don the CSK yellow in 2026 at his existing ₹18 crore league fee — part of a multi-player trade that also sends Sam Curran from CSK to RR.

items.headline: Mohammed Shami traded from SRH to Lucknow Super Giants
items.excerpt: The veteran India pacer will turn out for LSG under head coach Justin Langer after a successful trade from Sunrisers Hyderabad.
